data.name: AssignConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want assign this ticket ?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteDialog
data.value: Are you sure that you want to delete this ?

data.name: UpdateConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to update ticket status ... ?

data.name: DeleteClient
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this client?

data.name: MoveToDeleted
data.value: You can also move to deleted tickets

data.name: DeleteUser
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

data.name: NoAuthrizeCompanies
data.value: User Does Not Have Any Permission

data.name: NotSaved
data.value: The quotation not saved , you must save it before uploading

data.name: NoAttachments
data.value: There is no attachments on this quotation .

data.name: Note1
data.value: the quotation was posted to {0} unit by {1}

data.name: PostError
data.value: You can not post to the same business unit !!

data.name: Approve
data.value: Are you sure that you want to approve this request ?

data.name: St1
data.value: The request was accepted as quotation .

data.name: SQL1
data.value: SELECT sort,[ProgID],case when 'en'='{0}' then ProgEnName else ProgArName end as ProgArName , case when 'en'='{0}' then ProgEnName else ProgArName end as ProgEnName ,SourceForm,Icon,ParentID FROM S_RFQ_Menu

data.name: SQL2
data.value: SELECT * FROM S_RFQ_Actions WHERE seen = 0 and (ToBU IN (SELECT BusUnitID FROM Alpha_BusinessUnitDef WHERE (BusUnitID IN (SELECT BusUnitID FROM Alpha_BusinessUnitUsers WHERE (UserID = '{1}') AND (CompNo = '{0}') AND (Permission = 1))) AND (CompNo = '{0}'))) AND (CompNo = '{0}') and sr in(SELECT max(Sr) FROM S_RFQ_Actions GROUP BY RFQNo)

data.name: SQL3
data.value: SELECT * FROM S_Quotation_Actions WHERE done = 0 and seen = 0 and ToBU IN (SELECT BusUnit FROM Alpha_BusUnitUserPermissions WHERE (UserID = '{1}') AND (CompNo = '{0}'))

data.name: NewCopy
data.value: Continue the procedure and make new copy

data.name: ReadyTo
data.value: Are you sure that you want to move this quotation for feed back ?

data.name: SQL4
data.value: SELECT * FROM S_Quotation_Actions WHERE (seen = 0) AND (ToBU IN (SELECT BusUnitID FROM Alpha_BusinessUnitDef WHERE (BusUnitID IN (SELECT BusUnitID FROM Alpha_BusinessUnitUsers WHERE (UserID = '{1}') AND (CompNo = '{0}') AND (Permission = 1))) AND (CompNo = '{0}'))) AND (CompNo = '{0}') AND (Sr IN (SELECT MAX(Sr) AS Expr1 FROM S_RFQ_Actions GROUP BY RFQNo))

data.name: Help_AddButon
data.value: Press here to create new quotation

data.name: Help_Delete
data.value: Here you can delete this quotation

data.name: Help_TimeLine
data.value: Here is the quotation time line

data.name: ItemsError
data.value: You can't add more than one item with this type of request .

data.name: Approve2
data.value: Are you sure that you want to reject this request ?

data.name: TLST2
data.value: The request has been rejected in

data.name: TLST3
data.value: The request has been closed in

data.name: CompError
data.value: You are connected to this company , logout first then login again .

data.name: EditPostedContract
data.value: You can't edit posted contract , do you want to print ?

data.name: PostContract
data.value: Are you sure that you want to post this contract ? you will not be able to edit again .

data.name: NoPermission
data.value: You don't have permission to access this link

data.name: SegmentCountError
data.value: You have defined the maximum number of segments

data.name: CurrentCompanyError
data.value: You can't delete current company, delete faild !!!

data.name: SegmentsError
data.value: You can't delete company with segments or periods ., delete faild !!!

data.name: RefreshConfirm
data.value: You are about reload your page , do you want to continue ?

data.name: NoEmpolyments
data.value: Can not save request without adding labor!

data.name: PostRequest
data.value: Are you sure you want to post this request?

data.name: errorOkOPost
data.value: Basic salary must be entered for all movements

data.name: confirmCreateQuotation
data.value: Are you sure you want to Create Quotation?

data.name: SelectOneAtLeast
data.value: Select one employment at least to proceed the operation .

data.name: errormoiNo
data.value: you can't duplicate Minister of Interior Number

data.name: FeedBackConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to send this reply?

data.name: RejectionConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to Cancelling Application?

data.name: ApprovalConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to Approval Application?

data.name: confirmCreateContract
data.value: Are you sure you want to Create Contract?

data.name: ConfirmDeleteImage
data.value: Are you sure that you want to delete the Image?

data.name: CeckDeleteCompany
data.value: The record cannot be deleted because it is linked to other records

data.name: ActivateEmailMSG2
data.value: Congratulations your email has been verified, you can now login and fill in your company details. You can request employment and follow-up your requests after the approval of the supervisor of your company profile.

data.name: ApproveCompany
data.value: Are you sure that you want to approve this company profile ?

data.name: CompareWithlast
data.value: This year compared to the last year

data.name: NoContracts
data.value: There is no contracts to view

data.name: error
data.value: An error occurred that could not delete the record

data.name: errorEdit
data.value: An error occurred that could not Edit the record

data.name: errorPost
data.value: An error occurred that could not Post the record

data.name: AcceptConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to Accept Application?

data.name: RejectConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to Reject Application?

data.name: RreturnRequest
data.value: Are you sure you want to return this request?

data.name: DeliveryConfirm
data.value: Are you sure of the Delivery Confirmed?

data.name: ReceiptConfirm
data.value: Are you sure of the Receipt Confirmed?

data.name: ModifyDeliveryDate
data.value: Are you sure you want to modify the delivery date?

data.name: RenewDialog
data.value: Are you sure you want to extend the contract period? The financial entry will be posted directly ...

data.name: RejectConfrimDelvery
data.value: The date does not match the delivery date

data.name: ReceiptHousingConfirm
data.value: Are you sure of the Receipt Confirmed?

data.name: SendConfirm
data.value: Are you sure that you want to Send Application?

data.name: updateOP
data.value: Are you sure you want to update?

data.name: ActivationError
data.value: You must use a legitimate copy, and in case of any queries please check with the provider

data.name: WorkerStatusError
data.value: You can't edit this worker , because the status is :

data.name: ApprovedEntryExpenses
data.value: The adoption of the motion can not be modified

data.name: NotInList
data.value: Salary is not included in the price list

data.name: ReceiptPhoto
data.value: Please attach a copy of the financial receipt

data.name: PendingRequest
data.value: There is a pending request on the same agent

data.name: SelectionError
data.value: You can't select more than required .

data.name: ContractEmplymentConfirm
data.value: Are you sure to link this labor to this contract? You will not be able to change this information.

data.name: SelectOneEmplAtLeast
data.value: At least one employee must be selected

data.name: confirmPostSalary
data.value: Are you sure you want to post salaries of employees ??

data.name: EmployeeContract
data.value: There are no employees associated with this contract

data.name: AmountError
data.value: The amount paid must equal the required amount

data.name: ApprovalRequest
data.value: Are you sure to Approval the request?

data.name: RejectRequest
data.value: Are you sure to Reject the request?

data.name: EndContractConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to end this contract?

data.name: UpdateContractConfirm
data.value: Are you sure about the save process? A new copy of the contract will be created.

data.name: NoBu
data.value: You do not belong to a business unit, so you will not be able to log in.

data.name: ContractExpensCreated
data.value: An expense contract has already been created

data.name: BigSize
data.value: The file size is larger than the desired size

data.name: ActivatePostRequestPlan
data.value: Are you sure you want to send activate this request?

data.name: DeactivatePostRequestPlan
data.value: Are you sure you want to send Deactivate this request?

data.name: OnePurchaseOrderForAllItems
data.value: One Purchase Order For All Items

data.name: ConfirmCreatePurchaseOrders
data.value: Are you sure you want to create purchase Orders?

data.name: PurchaseOrderNoIssued
data.value: A purchase order has been issued

data.name: ConfirmBOMDef
data.value: Are you sure to save the production equation?

data.name: ConfirmQCTest
data.value: Are you sure to save the QC Test?

data.name: DeleteConfirmQCTest
data.value: Tests for this stage will be Delete

data.name: ConfirmPackDef
data.value: Are you sure to save the Packing Def.?

data.name: DeleteConfirmPackingAccessors
data.value: Packing Accessors for this item will be Delete

data.name: errormachinecode
data.value: Machine number may not be Entered

data.name: ConfirmProdOrder
data.value: Are you sure to save the production Order?

data.name: ConfirmeProdOrder
data.value: Are you sure to edit the production Order?

data.name: errorDelprepare_info
data.value: Movement approved. The motion cannot be deleted

data.name: ConfirmDailyProd
data.value: Are you sure to save the Daily production?

data.name: errorDailyProduction
data.value: The user Doesnt have permissions to Access the program

data.name: CeckDeleteDailyProd
data.value: Cannot delete because the order has been removed

data.name: CancelPurchaseOrders
data.value: Are you sure to cancel purchase orders?

data.name: ConfirmCreatePurchaseOrder
data.value: Are you sure you want to create purchase Orders?

data.name: errorPurchOrderSerial
data.value: You Cant Proceed You Should Define Serial For Purchase Requisition screen first

data.name: errorPurchaseOrderSerial
data.value: You Cant Proceed You Should Define Serial For Purchase Order screen first

data.name: errorProdOrderCreate
data.value: The order cannot be canceled due to the creation of a purchase order

data.name: ApprovalBestOffer
data.value: Are you sure to Approval the Offer?

data.name: AddShipmentInfo
data.value: Do you want to add Shipment information?

data.name: ApprovalShipment
data.value: Are you sure to Approval the Shipment?

data.name: ApprovalVoucIssue
data.value: Are you sure to Approval the Issue?

data.name: ConfirmEditPurchaseOrders
data.value: Are you sure to modify the purchase order?

data.name: ConfirmPurchaseOrderQty
data.value: Will the purchase order quantity be exceeded?

data.name: errorPurchaseOrderExpensesSerial
data.value: You Cant Proceed You Should Define Serial For Purchase Order Expenses screen first

data.name: ConfirmEditPOPrice
data.value: Are you sure you have exceeded the last price?
